mapper.sql: NEWSRATE_USERID, NEWSRATE_USERNAME, NEWSRATE_ADDTIME, NEWSRATE_CONTENT, NEWS_ID, NEWSRATE_MEMO, NEWSRATE_STATUS, NEWSRATE_PARENTID, NEWSRATE_TOUSERID, NEWSRATE_ID
mapper.update:
update
set NEWSRATE_USERID = #{NEWSRATE_USERID}, NEWSRATE_USERNAME = #{NEWSRATE_USERNAME}, NEWSRATE_ADDTIME = #{NEWSRATE_ADDTIME}, NEWSRATE_CONTENT = #{NEWSRATE_CONTENT}, NEWS_ID = #{NEWS_ID}, NEWSRATE_MEMO = #{NEWSRATE_MEMO}, NEWSRATE_STATUS = #{NEWSRATE_STATUS}, NEWSRATE_PARENTID = #{NEWSRATE_PARENTID}, NEWSRATE_TOUSERID = #{NEWSRATE_TOUSERID}, NEWSRATE_ID = NEWSRATE_ID where NEWSRATE_ID = #{NEWSRATE_ID}
